title: Dorry Fights Through the Pain
description: On pages 1–7, dorry fights through the pain as dorry and Brogy’s duel reaches a heartbreaking turning point as Baroque Works exploits the giants’ warrior pride.
scene: Dorry Fights Through the Pain. Dorry and Brogy’s duel reaches a heartbreaking turning point as Baroque Works exploits the giants’ warrior pride. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I know this might be out of the blue, but I've actually seen a real Ninja in my life. Yes, I'm serious. If I remember correctly, it was back when I was in the third grade when I had moved to Myazawa due to my dad getting a job transfer. The Ninja came

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: With a big roar, "Kaaaah!!!!" He split an enormous rock cleanly in two. All of us were completely blown away by what we just witnessed. Then, the Ninja called up a couple of the older kids up to the stage and said, "You may return to your seats." At first

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Please listen to us, Mr. Dorry! We're just as clueless as to why that rum exploded!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But you have to stay put for now! The insides of your body are damaged enough already from that explosion just now!
